'''Tengu Mask''' is a non-dyeable equipable item that makes your dog look mystical.{{Item
| image = Tengu_mask.png
| id = tengu_mask
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
| Description = Right-click with a String to switch the mask's position
}}[[File:Tengu_mask_display.png|none|thumb|600x600px|No MATTER WHAT! Don't go out at night!]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| Red Dye <br>+ Black Dye<br>+ [[Head Band]]
| [[File:Tengu_mask_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.17.2.
* The mask was based on a mythical creature depicted in Japanese folklore.<ref>[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tengu Tengu - Wikipedia]</ref>

<references />
